The [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]] '''Corona Limited''' luxury [[Speeder/Legends|groundspeeder]] was a popular [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] model in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. At ten [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, it could carry six passengers. It was available in 500 colors, including black as well as many colors undetectable to the Human eye.<ref name="HSCS" /> It had [[kudana]] [[Leather/Legends|leather]] seats that could be converted into sleeping berths.<ref name="GOI" />
